name: Clerk
description: Clerk is a user authentication and management platform for web and mobile applications. It provides APIs to create, read, update, and delete users, verify session tokens, and manage organizations. Use this to programmatically manage your application's user base, validate authentication sessions, and handle multi-tenant organization structures.

capabilities.name: list_users
capabilities.description: List all users in your Clerk application with filtering, sorting, and pagination support.

capabilities.name: get_user
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single user's full profile by their Clerk user ID.

capabilities.name: create_user
capabilities.description: Create a new user account with email, phone, username, or external credentials.

capabilities.name: update_user
capabilities.description: Update an existing user's profile information, metadata, or authentication settings.

capabilities.name: delete_user
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a user and all their associated data from your Clerk application.

capabilities.name: verify_session
capabilities.description: Verify a session token to confirm it is valid and retrieve the associated session details.

capabilities.name: list_organizations
capabilities.description: List all organizations in your Clerk application with pagination and filtering.
